B.C. Ministerial Order 165: HEALTH Mental Health, s. 3 (1) 1. MO 335/2024 is rescinded; and 2. MO 393/2016, Schedule A, is amended by adding a designation of "Spiritwood Homes, Maple Ridge".

B.C. Order in Council 152: TRANSPORTATION AND TRANSIT Motor Vehicle, s. 209 (1) and (2) The Motor Vehicle Act Regulations, B.C. Reg. 26/58, are amended as set out in the Schedule.
